properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Down from His glory, Ever living story, My God and Saviour came, And Jesus was His Name. Born in a manger, To His own a stranger, A Man of sorrows, Tears and agony.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Oh how I love Him! How I adore Him! My breath, my sunshine, My all in all! The great Creator Became my Saviour, And all God's fullness Dwelleth in Him.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: What condescension, Bringing us redemption; That in the dead of night, Not one faint hope in sight; God, gracious, tender, Laid aside His splendor, Stooping to woo, to win, To save my soul.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Without reluctance, Flesh and blood His substance, He took the form of man, Revealed the hidden plan. Oh glorious mystery, Sacrifice of Calvary, And now I know Thou art the great "I Am."
